content: macOS multi-source now-playing precedence: the system MediaRemote 'Now Playing' has no fixed app priority — whichever app most recently became active/started playing takes the Now Playing slot (Safari/browser tabs can steal it). This is a known pain point. Third-party apps (SpotMenu, Mac Media Key Forwarder) solve it with auto-detect plus MANUAL source selection/prioritization. User expectation: a preferred-source setting and a manual override, plus 'last active wins' as the auto default.
